questions.question: Forklift ka primary function kya hai?

options.A: Logon ko ek jagah se doosri jagah le jaana
options.B: Bade aur bhari saman ko uthana aur move karna

questions.explanation: Forklift ka mukhya kaam bhari saman jaise pallets ko uthana aur warehouse ke andar move karna hai.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'aisle' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Woh jagah jahan saman store kiya jaata hai
options.B: Forklift aur logon ke chalne ka rasta

questions.explanation: Aisle woh rasta hota hai jahan forklift aur workers warehouse mein move karte hain.

questions.question: Counterbalance forklift ki pehchan kya hai?

options.A: Ismein forks side mein hote hain
options.B: Iske peeche ek heavy weight hota hai
options.C: Yeh sirf chote saman uthata hai
options.D: Yeh sirf battery se chalta hai

questions.explanation: Counterbalance forklift mein peeche ek heavy weight hota hai jo uthaye hue load ko balance karta hai.

questions.question: Pallet jack ka upyog kisliye kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Zameen se thoda upar pallets ko move karne ke liye
options.C: Unchi racks par saman rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Pallet jack ka upyog zameen par ya thodi unchai tak pallets ko uthane aur move karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Ek forklift operator ke liye sabse important quality kya hai?

options.B: Hamesha safety rules follow karna
options.D: Phone par baat karte hue kaam karna

questions.explanation: Safety rules ko follow karna ek forklift operator ke liye sabse zyada important hai taaki accidents se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Reach truck kis tarah ke warehouses mein use hota hai?

options.B: Narrow aisles wale warehouses mein

questions.explanation: Reach truck narrow aisles mein high racks par saman rakhne aur uthane ke liye design kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'rack' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Saman store karne ke liye bani shelves

questions.explanation: Rack woh structure hota hai jahan saman ko organize tareeke se store kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Forklift operator ki jimmedari kya nahi hai?

options.B: Load capacity se zyada saman uthana

questions.explanation: Load capacity se zyada saman uthana bahut khatarnak hai aur operator ki jimmedari nahi hai.

questions.question: Electric forklift ka mukhya fayda kya hai?

options.B: Outdoor use ke liye best hai
options.C: Kam noise karta hai aur zero emissions deta hai

questions.explanation: Electric forklifts shant hote hain aur exhaust fumes nahi chhodte, isliye indoor use ke liye acche hain.

questions.question: Forklift chalate samay kya avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Tez corners lena

questions.explanation: Tez corners lene se forklift unstable ho sakta hai aur load gir sakta hai ya palat sakta hai.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'loading dock' kya hota hai?

options.A: Jahan forklifts park kiye jaate hain
options.B: Jahan trucks aur trailers se saman load/unload kiya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Loading dock woh area hota hai jahan trucks aur trailers se saman ko warehouse mein transfer kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Order picker forklift ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Individual items ko high racks se pick karna
options.C: Outdoor construction sites par kaam karna

questions.explanation: Order picker forklift operator ko high shelves se individual items pick karne ki suvidha deta hai.

questions.question: Why is it important to keep the warehouse floor clean and free of debris?

options.B: Accidents jaise slips aur falls ko rokne ke liye
options.C: Light bill kam karne ke liye
options.D: Customer ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Saaf floor se forklifts aur pedestrians dono ke liye safety badhti hai, aur accidents ka khatra kam hota hai.

questions.question: Forklift operator certification kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Legal requirement hai aur safe operation ensure karta hai

questions.explanation: Certification legal requirement hai aur yeh ensure karta hai ki operator forklift ko safely aur efficiently chala sake.

questions.question: Ek forklift ki 'capacity' se kya matlab hai?

options.A: Woh kitni speed se chal sakta hai
options.B: Woh kitna fuel consume karta hai
options.C: Maximum weight jo woh safely utha sakta hai

questions.explanation: Forklift ki capacity uski maximum weight uthane ki kshamta ko darshati hai, jise safely handle kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'FIFO' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fast Inventory, Fast Order

questions.explanation: FIFO (First In, First Out) ek inventory management method hai jahan pehle aaya hua saman pehle nikala jaata hai, khaaskar perishable goods ke liye.

questions.question: Forklift chalate samay vision ka importance kya hai?

options.B: Hamesha apne surroundings ko monitor karna
options.D: Mirror mein dekhna zaroori nahi hai

questions.explanation: Accidents se bachne ke liye aur safety maintain karne ke liye forklift operator ko hamesha apne aas-paas ke area ko monitor karna chahiye.

questions.question: Forklift ke 'mast' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Forks ko upar aur neeche move karna
options.C: Operator ko baithne ki jagah dena

questions.explanation: Mast woh vertical structure hota hai jo forks ko lift aur lower karta hai.

questions.question: Forks ko 'tilt' karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Forks ko left ya right ghumana
options.B: Forks ko aage ya peeche jhukana

questions.explanation: Tilt function se forks aage (down-tilt) ya peeche (back-tilt) jhukaye jaate hain, load ko stable rakhne ke liye.

questions.question: Forklift mein 'carriage' kisko kehte hain?

options.B: Mast par laga hua component jo forks ko hold karta hai

questions.explanation: Carriage woh platform hai jo mast par upar-neeche move karta hai aur forks us par attach hote hain.

questions.question: Electric forklift mein power source kya hota hai?

options.B: Petrol engine

questions.explanation: Electric forklifts batteries se operate hote hain jinhe recharge kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Internal Combustion (IC) forklift mein fuel kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Diesel, Petrol ya LPG

questions.explanation: IC forklifts diesel, petrol ya liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) jaise fuels par chalte hain.

questions.question: Forklift ka 'overhead guard' kis kaam aata hai?

options.A: Operator ko dhoop se bachane ke liye
options.B: Operator ko girne wale saman se bachane ke liye
options.C: Forklift ko tez chalane ke liye
options.D: Load ko balance karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Overhead guard operator ko upar se girne wale chhote saman se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Hydraulic controls ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Speed control karna
options.C: Forks ko lift, lower aur tilt karna

questions.explanation: Hydraulic system pressure ka upyog karke forks ko upar-neeche karne aur tilt karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Forklift mein 'side-shift' feature ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Forks ko left ya right move karna bina forklift chalaye

questions.explanation: Side-shift attachment operator ko load ko left ya right position karne mein help karta hai, jisse precise placement aasan ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Forklift ke dashboard par 'hour meter' kya dikhata hai?

options.B: Engine/motor ke chalne ke ghante

questions.explanation: Hour meter forklift ke engine ya motor ke total operating hours ko record karta hai, jo maintenance scheduling ke liye useful hai.

questions.question: Steering wheel ka kya kaam hai forklift mein?

options.B: Forklift ki direction change karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Steering wheel forklift ko left ya right turn karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Accelerator pedal ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Forklift ki speed badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Accelerator pedal engine ya motor ko power supply badhata hai, jisse forklift ki speed badhti hai.

questions.question: Forklift mein 'dead man's switch' ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Emergency mein forklift ko tez chalana
options.B: Operator seat se utarte hi forklift ko band kar dena

questions.explanation: Dead man's switch ek safety feature hai jo operator ke seat chhodte hi ya control release karte hi forklift ko automatically band kar deta hai.

questions.question: Parking brake kab lagana chahiye?

options.B: Jab forklift park kiya ho ya operator usse utar raha ho
options.C: Jab load uthaya ja raha ho

questions.explanation: Parking brake ko hamesha lagana chahiye jab forklift park kiya ho ya operator usse utar raha ho taaki woh khud se move na kare.

questions.question: Forklift ke tires kis tarah ke hote hain?

options.B: Solid rubber ya pneumatic tires

questions.explanation: Forklifts mein solid rubber (puncture-proof) ya air-filled pneumatic tires use hote hain, depend karta hai use aur terrain par.

questions.question: Reverse horn ya beeper kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Operator ka dhyan rakhne ke liye
options.B: Peeche chal rahe logon ko alert karne ke liye
options.C: Forklift ko tez chalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Reverse horn peeche chal rahe logon aur dusre vehicles ko alert karta hai ki forklift peeche ja raha hai.

questions.question: Battery indicator ka kya importance hai electric forklift mein?

options.B: Battery ke charge level ko dikhana

questions.explanation: Battery indicator electric forklift mein remaining battery charge ko dikhata hai, taaki operator ko pata chale kab charge karna hai.

questions.question: What is the function of the load backrest on a forklift?

options.B: Load ko peeche girne se rokna

questions.explanation: Load backrest ek safety feature hai jo load ko mast ki taraf girne se rokta hai, khaaskar jab load uncha uthaya gaya ho.

questions.question: Forklift chalate samay kaun sa Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) hamesha pehna chahiye?

options.B: Helmet aur safety shoes

questions.explanation: Forklift chalate samay helmet, safety shoes, high-visibility jacket, aur zaroorat padne par safety goggles aur gloves bhi pehna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Load capacity chart ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Maximum weight jo forklift safely utha sakta hai, uski jankari dena

questions.explanation: Load capacity chart har forklift ke liye specify karta hai ki woh kitna maximum weight, kitni height tak aur kitne load centre par safely utha sakta hai.

questions.question: Forklift ka 'stability triangle' kya darshata hai?

options.B: Forklift ki kitni stability hai
options.C: Forklift kitne tez corners le sakta hai
options.D: Forklift kitne pahad chadh sakta hai

questions.explanation: Stability triangle ek imaginary area hai jo forklift ki stability ko define karta hai. Iske bahar load jaane par forklift palat sakta hai.

questions.question: Pedestrians (paidal chalne wale log) ki safety ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Hamesha horn bajana aur unse safe distance maintain karna
options.C: Tez drive karna taaki woh raaste se hat jaayen
options.D: Unhe load uthane mein help karne ke liye kehna

questions.explanation: Pedestrians ki safety sabse upar hai. Hamesha horn bajaye, unse safe distance rakhen aur unhe right-of-way den.

questions.question: Hazard identification se kya matlab hai?

options.B: Kaam ki jagah par khatron ko pehchanana

questions.explanation: Hazard identification ka matlab hai kaam ki jagah par aise potential khatron ko pehchanana jo injury ya damage ka karan ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar forklift par fuel leak ho raha hai, toh pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Ignition band karna aur leak ko report karna

questions.explanation: Fuel leak aag aur explosion ka khatra hai. Turant ignition band karein aur leak ko supervisor ko report karein.

questions.question: Warehouse mein speed limits kyu zaroori hain?

options.B: Fuel bachane ke liye
options.C: Accidents ko rokne aur control maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Saman jaldi deliver karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Speed limits accidents ko rokne, pedestrians aur dusre equipment ke saath takkar se bachne ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi defected forklift dikhe, toh kya karein?

options.B: Supervisor ko turant report karein aur use use na karein
options.C: Khud theek karne ki koshish karein

questions.explanation: Defected equipment ko use karna khatarnak ho sakta hai. Turant report karein aur use tab tak use na karein jab tak woh theek na ho jaaye.

questions.question: Ramps par forklift chalate samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Load hamesha upar ki taraf hona chahiye, chahe upar ja rahe ho ya neeche
options.C: Load hamesha neeche ki taraf hona chahiye

questions.explanation: Ramp par chalte samay load hamesha uphill (upar ki taraf) hona chahiye, taaki stability bani rahe aur load girne ka khatra kam ho.

questions.question: Forklift parking ke liye sahi jagah kaunsi hai?

options.A: Kisi bhi aisle ke beech mein
options.B: Emergency exit ke saamne
options.C: Designated parking area mein, forks neeche aur parking brake laga kar

questions.explanation: Forklift ko hamesha designated parking area mein, forks zameen par neeche karke aur parking brake laga kar park karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aapki vision block ho rahi hai load ki wajah se, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Kisi aur operator ko help ke liye bulana ya reverse mein chalana

questions.explanation: Agar vision block ho rahi hai, toh reverse mein chalayein ya kisi spotter ki help lein taaki accidents se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'no-go' zones kyu banaye jaate hain?

options.A: Wahan saman store karne ke liye
options.B: High-risk areas ko mark karne ke liye jahan forklifts ko nahi jaana chahiye

questions.explanation: No-go zones aise areas hote hain jahan forklifts ko enter karne ki permission nahi hoti, typically high pedestrian traffic ya sensitive equipment areas.

questions.question: Overhead power lines ke paas kaam karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Jitna ho sake unke kareeb jaana
options.B: Hamesha unse safe distance maintain karna

questions.explanation: Overhead power lines se hamesha safe distance maintain karein kyunki unse current lagne ka khatra hota hai.

questions.question: What is the primary danger when operating a forklift on an uneven surface?

options.B: Tires jaldi ghisenge

questions.explanation: Uneven surfaces par forklift ki stability kam ho jaati hai, jisse palatne ka khatra badh jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar forklift ke brakes fail ho jaayen toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Forklift se kud jaana
options.C: Kisi cheez se takra kar rokne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Agar service brakes fail ho jaayen, toh emergency brake ka use karein aur turant supervisor ko report karein.

questions.question: Indian factory act ke hisab se forklift operator ke liye training kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Worker ki safety aur efficient operation ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Company ka paisa bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Indian factory act ke तहत, forklift operators ko proper training aur certification milna zaroori hai taaki woh safely aur efficiently kaam kar sakein.

questions.question: Agar koi load unstable dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Usko stable karne ki koshish karna ya help ke liye bulana
options.D: Usko jaldi se utha kar rakh dena

questions.explanation: Unstable load ko uthana bahut khatarnak ho sakta hai. Usko stable karne ki koshish karein ya help ke liye supervisor ko bulayein.

questions.question: Pre-operation check mein battery ka kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Charge level, connections aur koi damage

questions.explanation: Battery ka charge level, terminals ke connections aur koi physical damage pre-operation check mein zaroori hai.

questions.question: Engine oil level kab check karna chahiye?

options.B: Har din, forklift start karne se pehle

questions.explanation: Engine oil level ko hamesha thande engine mein, daily pre-operation check ke dauran check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Tires ka kya check karna chahiye pre-operation check mein?

options.B: Pressure, cuts, ya koi damage

questions.explanation: Tires ka sahi pressure, aur unpar koi cuts, punctures ya excessive wear toh nahi hai, yeh check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Brakes ka function kaise check karte hain?

options.B: Slow speed par forklift chala kar aur service brakes apply karke

questions.explanation: Brakes ko slow speed par forklift chala kar check karna chahiye ki woh smoothly aur effectively kaam kar rahe hain ya nahi.

questions.question: Horn aur lights ka check kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Safety aur communication ke liye
options.D: Forklift ko tez chalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Horn aur lights dusre logon ko alert karne aur visibility provide karne ke liye zaroori hain, khaaskar kam roshni mein.

questions.question: Hydraulic fluid level kab check karna chahiye?

options.B: Daily, forklift start karne se pehle

questions.explanation: Hydraulic fluid level ko bhi daily pre-operation check mein, forks neeche karke aur engine band hone par check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar pre-operation check mein koi defect mile, toh kya karein?

options.A: Usko ignore karke kaam karte rehna
options.B: Usko turant supervisor ko report karna aur forklift ko operate na karna
options.C: Khud theek karne ki koshish karna
options.D: Kisi aur ko use karne dena

questions.explanation: Koi bhi defect milne par, turant supervisor ko report karein aur forklift ko tab tak operate na karein jab tak woh theek na ho jaaye.

questions.question: Seatbelt ka kya importance hai forklift mein?

options.B: Accident hone par operator ko forklift ke andar rakhne ke liye
options.C: Load ko stable rakhne ke liye
options.D: Forklift ko balance karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Seatbelt operator ko forklift ke palatne ya takrane ki sthiti mein uske andar surakshit rakhta hai.

questions.question: Battery charging area mein kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper ventilation aur aag ke sources se dur rehna
options.D: Charger ko khule mein chhod dena

questions.explanation: Battery charging ke dauran hydrogen gas release hoti hai jo explosive hoti hai, isliye proper ventilation aur aag ke sources se dur rehna zaroori hai.

questions.question: LPG forklift mein gas cylinder ka kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Leakage ke signs, proper fitting aur damage

questions.explanation: LPG cylinder mein leakage, connections ki tightness aur koi physical damage daily check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Coolant level kab check karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab engine thanda ho

questions.explanation: Coolant level ko hamesha thande engine mein check karna chahiye taaki sahi reading mile aur jalne ka khatra na ho.

questions.question: Mast aur forks mein kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Koi cracks, bends, ya excessive wear

questions.explanation: Mast aur forks mein cracks, bends, ya excessive wear ke signs check karna zaroori hai kyunki yeh load handling ko affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Routine maintenance schedule kyu follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf time waste karne ke liye
options.B: Forklift ki life badhane aur breakdowns ko rokne ke liye
options.D: Operator ko busy rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Routine maintenance forklift ki efficiency, safety aur life ko badhata hai aur unexpected breakdowns ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Agar steering mein koi dikkat mehsoos ho, toh kya karein?

options.B: Turant report karna aur forklift ko use na karna
options.C: Steering wheel ko zor se ghumana

questions.explanation: Steering mein koi bhi problem safety ke liye khatarnak ho sakti hai. Turant report karein aur forklift ko use na karein.

questions.question: Daily logbook mein kya record karna chahiye?

options.B: Forklift number, operator ka naam, hour meter reading, aur koi bhi defect ya maintenance

questions.explanation: Daily logbook mein detailed entries rakhna zaroori hai taaki forklift ki history, maintenance aur operational status track kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Overhead guard mein koi damage hone par kya karein?

options.B: Supervisor ko report karna aur forklift ko operate na karna
options.C: Khud repair karne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Overhead guard ek crucial safety feature hai. Damage hone par turant report karein aur forklift ko operate na karein.

questions.question: Pre-operation check kitni der tak chalna chahiye?

options.B: Jab tak saare required items check na ho jaayen, typically 5-10 minutes

questions.explanation: Pre-operation check mein har zaroori item ko dhyan se check karna chahiye, ismein 5-10 minute lag sakte hain.

questions.question: Load uthate samay forks ko kaise position karna chahiye?

options.B: Dono forks ko load ke center mein aur pallet ke andar poora daalna
options.D: Forks ko load ke niche rakhna

questions.explanation: Load ko uthane se pehle, forks ko load ke center mein aur pallet ke andar poora daalna chahiye taaki load stable rahe.

questions.question: Load uthane ke baad kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Load ko thoda sa uthakar, mast ko peeche tilt karna aur forks ko neeche rakhna

questions.explanation: Load uthane ke baad, usko zameen se thoda upar uthayein, mast ko peeche tilt karein (back-tilt) aur forks ko travel position par rakhein taaki load stable rahe.

questions.question: Load ke saath chalte samay forks ki height kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: Zameen se 6-10 inches (15-25 cm) upar

questions.explanation: Load ke saath chalte samay forks ko zameen se 6-10 inches upar rakhna chahiye taaki uneven surfaces par takraye nahi aur visibility bani rahe.

questions.question: Blind corners par kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Horn bajana aur slow speed se turn lena

questions.explanation: Blind corners par hamesha horn bajana aur slow speed se turn lena chahiye taaki dusre pedestrians ya vehicles ko alert kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Agar load bahut bada ho aur aage ki vision block kar raha ho, toh kaise drive karein?

options.A: Aage ki taraf drive karte rehna
options.B: Peeche ki taraf drive karna (reverse) ya spotter ki help lena

questions.explanation: Agar load vision block kar raha ho, toh peeche ki taraf drive karein (reverse) ya kisi spotter (helper) ki madad lein taaki accidents se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Staking (saman jama karna) karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Saman ko jaisa mann kare waisa rakhna
options.B: Stable aur evenly distributed stack banana
options.C: Saman ko ek taraf jhuka kar rakhna
options.D: Jitna ho sake utna uncha stack banana

questions.explanation: Saman ko stack karte samay hamesha yeh ensure karein ki stack stable, evenly distributed aur load capacity ke andar ho.

questions.question: De-stacking (saman utarne) karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Sabse upar wala saman pehle uthana
options.B: Stack ko carefuly examine karna aur sirf stable loads uthana
options.D: Kisi bhi saman ko utha lena

questions.explanation: De-stacking se pehle stack ko check karein. Sirf stable loads ko uthayein aur stack ki stability ko disturb na karein.

questions.question: Ramps par neeche utarte samay kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Free-wheel karna (clutch chhod kar)
options.C: Slow speed par, engine engaged rakhte hue neeche utarna

questions.explanation: Ramps par neeche utarte samay slow speed par, engine engaged rakhte hue utarna chahiye taaki control bana rahe aur brakes par zyada load na pade.

questions.question: Agar forklift ka ek wheel pothole mein chala jaaye toh kya karein?

options.A: Tez speed se nikalne ki koshish karna
options.B: Load ko neeche karna aur slowly nikalne ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Pothole mein phase hone par, load ko neeche karein taaki stability badhe, aur phir slowly aur carefully nikalne ki koshish karein.

questions.question: Forklift ko turn karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Load ki height ko ignore karna
options.B: Hamesha slow speed par turn lena aur steering wheel smoothly ghumana

questions.explanation: Turn karte samay slow speed maintain karein aur steering wheel ko smoothly ghumayein taaki forklift unstable na ho.

questions.question: Load ko uthane se pehle 'load center' kyu check karna chahiye?

options.B: Load ki stability aur forklift ki capacity ko ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Load kitna purana hai, yeh janne ke liye
options.D: Load ka color check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Load center load ki stability aur forklift ki capacity par direct impact dalta hai. Sahi load center par load uthana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar load uneven ho toh kya karein?

options.A: Usko uthane se mana kar dena
options.B: Usko evenly distribute karne ki koshish karna ya help lena
options.C: Usko ek taraf jhuka kar uthana

questions.explanation: Uneven load forklift ki stability ko kam kar sakta hai. Usko evenly distribute karne ki koshish karein ya help ke liye supervisor ko bulayein.

questions.question: Narrow aisles mein forklift chalate samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Extra careful rehna, slow speed maintain karna aur horn ka use karna

questions.explanation: Narrow aisles mein accidents ka khatra zyada hota hai, isliye extra careful rehna, slow speed aur horn ka use karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar forklift ka load gir jaaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Jaldi se uthane ki koshish karna
options.B: Area ko secure karna, supervisor ko report karna aur help ka wait karna
options.C: Kisi ko bataye bina chhod dena

questions.explanation: Load girne par, area ko secure karein, supervisor ko report karein aur tab tak wait karein jab tak help na aa jaaye.

questions.question: Forklift ko rokne ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Smoothly accelerator chhodna aur service brakes apply karna

questions.explanation: Forklift ko smoothly rokna chahiye taaki load stable rahe aur operator ko koi jhatka na lage.

questions.question: Jab forklift park kiya ho, toh forks ko kis position mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Zameen par neeche karke

questions.explanation: Forks ko hamesha zameen par neeche karke park karna chahiye taaki koi unse takra kar gir na jaaye.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'LIFO' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Light Inventory, Fast Order

questions.explanation: LIFO (Last In, First Out) ek inventory management method hai jahan sabse last mein aaya hua saman pehle nikala jaata hai, jo non-perishable goods ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Inventory accuracy kyu important hai warehouse mein?

options.A: Sirf paper work badhane ke liye
options.B: Customer satisfaction, efficient operations aur stock management ke liye
options.C: Staff ko busy rakhne ke liye
options.D: Light bill kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Accurate inventory se customer satisfaction badhti hai, operations smooth hote hain aur stockouts ya overstocking se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Dock plate (bridge plate) ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Forklift ko park karne ke liye
options.B: Loading dock aur truck ke beech ek safe bridge banana
options.C: Saman ko store karne ke liye
options.D: Forklift ko wash karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dock plate loading dock aur truck/trailer ke beech gap ko cover karta hai, jisse forklifts safely move kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Trailer ko load ya unload karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Trailer ko bina check kiye load karna
options.B: Trailer brakes engaged hon aur wheel chocks lage hon, yeh ensure karna
options.C: Trailer ko hamesha unhooked chhod dena

questions.explanation: Trailer ko load/unload karte samay yeh ensure karein ki trailer ke brakes lage hon aur wheel chocks use kiye gaye hon taaki woh move na kare.

questions.question: Warehouse mein communication ke liye kya methods use hote hain?

options.B: Hand signals, radio, ya predefined horn signals

questions.explanation: Effective communication ke liye hand signals, radio ya predefined horn signals ka use kiya jaata hai, khaaskar noisy environments mein.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi spill dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant report karna aur spill ko clean karne mein help karna (agar safe ho)
options.C: Usko dusre operators par chhod dena

questions.explanation: Spills accidents ka karan ban sakte hain. Turant report karein aur agar training mili ho toh safely clean karein.

questions.question: Forklift operator ki efficiency kaise improve ki ja sakti hai?

options.B: Proper training, safe operating practices aur regular maintenance se

questions.explanation: Proper training, safe practices aur regular maintenance se forklift operator ki efficiency aur productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: Racks par saman rakhte samay 'clearance' kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Forklift aur load ko racks se takrane se bachane ke liye
options.C: Saman ko zyada khubsoorat dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper clearance se forklifts aur loads racks se takrate nahi hain, jisse damage aur accidents se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'zone picking' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi jagah se saman uthana
options.B: Warehouse ko alag-alag zones mein divide karna aur har operator ko ek zone assign karna

questions.explanation: Zone picking mein warehouse ko alag-alag zones mein divide kiya jaata hai, aur har operator apne assigned zone se order pick karta hai, jisse efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Forklift chalate samay distractions (jaise mobile phone) kyu avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf boss ko khush karne ke liye
options.B: Accidents ke khatre ko kam karne aur complete concentration maintain karne ke liye
options.D: Dusre operators ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Distractions se operator ka dhyan bhatakta hai aur accidents ka khatra badh jaata hai. Hamesha complete concentration se kaam karein.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi abnormal noise ya vibration mehsoos ho toh kya karein?

options.B: Turant forklift ko band karna aur supervisor ko report karna

questions.explanation: Abnormal noise ya vibration kisi serious mechanical problem ka sign ho sakta hai. Turant forklift ko band karein aur report karein.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'cross-docking' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Saman ko ek dock se dusre dock par le jaana
options.B: Saman ko bina storage ke seedhe incoming truck se outgoing truck mein transfer karna
options.C: Saman ko warehouse mein store karna

questions.explanation: Cross-docking ek logistics strategy hai jahan products ko warehouse mein store kiye bina seedhe incoming se outgoing transportation mein transfer kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Forklift ki 'turning radius' se kya matlab hai?

options.A: Woh kitni speed se turn le sakta hai
options.B: Minimum space jismein forklift poora turn le sakta hai

questions.explanation: Turning radius woh minimum space hai jo forklift ko poora turn lene ke liye chahiye, jo narrow aisles mein important hota hai.

questions.question: Agar forklift over-heated ho jaaye toh kya karein?

options.B: Turant band karna aur thanda hone dena, phir report karna

questions.explanation: Overheating engine damage kar sakti hai. Turant band karein, thanda hone dein, aur phir supervisor ko report karein.

questions.question: Warehouse mein 'pick path optimization' kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf operators ko confuse karne ke liye
options.B: Time aur effort kam karne ke liye jab saman pick kar rahe ho
options.C: Zyada saman store karne ke liye
options.D: Forklift ko tez chalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Pick path optimization se operators kam se kam distance travel karke zyada se zyada orders pick kar sakte hain, jisse efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek forklift operator ko hamesha kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf apne kaam par dhyan dena
options.B: Hamesha safety rules follow karna aur surroundings par dhyan dena

questions.explanation: Ek responsible forklift operator hamesha safety rules follow karta hai aur apne surroundings par dhyan deta hai taaki sabhi surakshit rahein.
